name: Regions Financial Corporation Depositary Shares each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a  Share of 5.700% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative  Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C
summary: Regions Financial Corporation is a bank holding company that provides retail banking, commercial banking, and wealth management services. This specific ticker represents depositary shares representing 1/40th interest in the company's 5.700% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C. The company's banking operations are primarily located in the Southern United States.
